ksa_text: Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version control, automated testing, CI/CD deployment, infrastructure-as-code, environment parity, rollback procedures, and production-ready release management.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This task KSA describes execution-level work in Data Architecture & Analytics that is not expected of a Director of Data Products (director tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this execution-level task KSA be expected of a Director of Data Products in real-world practice?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Compensation benchmarks and leadership effectiveness research confirm that director-tier roles direct and oversee execution work in Data Architecture & Analytics rather than performing it. Role scope analysis supports exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: execution-level task KSA in Data Architecture & Analytics is appropriately excluded for a non-execution director role. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level task KSA in Data Architecture & Analytics is outside the expected competency scope for a Director of Data Products (director tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
